title: Pack of 8 Pom Pom Xmas Gift Tags, Santa and Snowman Shaped Hanging Tags with String, Greetings Labels Best for Gift Wrapping, Home Decoration for Christmas, Holidays, Birthday Party
features: Charming Christmas Gift Tags - Get 8x Pom Pom Xmas Gift Tags (4x Santa Shape and 4x Snowman Shape) with hanging strings. Perfect for adding a festive touch to gifts, these tags are ideal for Christmas presents, holiday wrapping, and more.

Durable & Reusable Design - Made from metallic paper, these tags are durable, lightweight, and reusable. Measuring 10cm x 6.5cm, they’re easy to hang and perfect for Christmas gift wrapping, ensuring your gifts stand out under the tree.

Mix of Santa and Snowman Shapes - This set includes 4 Santa and 4 Snowman tags, each uniquely designed to add a classic and vintage look to your holiday presents. The tags feature metallic threads for easy hanging and a festive touch.

Versatile Holiday Decor - Use these tags not only for gift wrapping but also to decorate your home. Perfect for hanging on walls, doors, and trees, or for creating beautiful Christmas cards and crafts. A great way to spread holiday cheer!

Ideal for Gifting & Craft Projects - These Pom Pom Xmas Gift Tags are perfect for more than just presents. Use them as wedding favor tags, thank you tags, price tags, and on cupcakes, mason jars, and other crafts. A versatile addition to any holiday celebration.
description: Product description XMAS GIFT TAGS ARE FASHIONABLE, ATTRACTIVE AND EASY TO ATTACH WITH ANY GIFT: Wrap yourself up in a world of festive magic with our North Pole approved collection of Christmas cards, wrapping paper, gift bags and more. Whether you’re looking for the perfect card for Mum, wrapping paper to reflect your kids’ favourite things or a special way to let someone know you’re thinking of them this Christmas time, whatever you need, we’re here to make all your wishes come true. The Tags are very good quality, the paper/material used is stable. Nice quality, the tags feel sturdy and the surface is great for decorating. Really nice tags with string which can be used for any purpose really, gives parcels and gifts a really rustic homemade feel. Fits very well as a guest card and thanks to the tag is easy to attach to a jam jar. These Oval shaped Tags are fashionable, attractive and classy and fit for any gift. The gift tags are easy to label, they look good and go with the times without foil or the like. Your gift will be more high-end, elegant and romantic with a silver Tags, giving the receiver greater surprises and satisfaction. Round Tags are suitable for a bookmark, a greeting card, a photo prop, a life label and a decorative craft. Ideal for gift wrapping tags, wedding favour tags, name tags, price tags, and reading notes, among other things. Safety Warning Warning: Keep out of reach of children. Do not swallow. If swallowed, seek immediate medical attention.
